The '''[[Dashade/Legends|Dashade]] sonic disruptor''' was an improvement on the [[Dashade sonic blaster]] which combined the elements of a sonic weapon with that of a disruptor.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
